title: Mazars Comment: Idiosyncrasies
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this morning
This is a very idiosyncratic world. As politicians diverge and compete, so do economies and so will policies. One may expect the Fed to cut rates, but Europe is still facing an uphill battle in terms of inflation, which is now stickier.
